## Procedure compliance

Every autonomous-researcher PR must complete this section. Leave a checkbox unchecked only if the item is genuinely not applicable, and explain why in the notes below.

- [ ] Read the required operating context before starting: `docs/current_project_context.md`, `loops/autonomous_researcher_loop.md`, `registries/assumption_register.csv`, and `registries/claim_register.md`.
- [ ] Scoped the work to one bounded, reviewable task.
- [ ] Ran the self-check for assumptions, estimands, false-complex model choice, literature claims, causal claims, restricted data, expensive compute, and claim promotion.
- [ ] Updated relevant registries, or explicitly stated that no registry updates were needed.
- [ ] Created or updated a structured cycle report in `logs/research_updates/`, or explained why this PR is exempt.
- [ ] Ran applicable validation checks, or documented why they could not be run.
- [ ] Confirmed that no confidential RAID data, participant-level restricted outputs, secrets, or local-only files were committed.
- [ ] Identified whether PI direction is needed; if needed, asked one concrete question with options.
- [ ] Kept scientific claims within the current evidence status in the claim registry.
- [ ] Named the next bounded task.
